data.name: WelcomeBody
data.value: Before you can save your first prompt, you need to set up two things inside your Tenant: a Workspace and a Project. They give every prompt a real organizational home — searchable, shareable, and scoped to the right initiative.

data.name: StepOneBody
data.value: A Workspace is the area inside your Tenant that groups related streams of work. It is where sharing rules are defined and where you decide who can collaborate on what.

data.name: StepTwoBody
data.value: Projects live inside a Workspace and are the actual containers of your prompts, folders, versions, and variables. Without at least one Project, there is no place to save your work.
